posts.author: KaitkFGC (Kait K.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Reminders.

Our connected companies all actively use the Reminders feature in the updates. It sends out a push notification and email to me when something is due for revisit. However there is such limited options. It should be more customizable. I don’t always need to create a new task, I just need to follow up in exactly one week or a month. I wish it were more options or complete customize only.
